      const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 历史记录保存器\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\nimport { trackEventIfLoggedIn, TelemetryEvents } from './telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    private source: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history', source: string = 'unknown') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n        this.source = source;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] ========== Starting save ==========`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] History dir: ${this.historyDir}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Source: ${this.source}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Composer ID: ${composer.composerId}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Composer name: ${composer.name || 'untitled'}`);\n        \n        // 确保目录存在\n        try {\n            await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] Directory ensured: ${this.historyDir}`);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error(`[HistorySaver] Failed to create directory: ${error}`);\n            throw error;\n        }\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Target filepath: ${filepath}`);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Should save: ${shouldSave}`);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            try {\n                await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n                console.log(`[HistorySaver] ✓ Saved successfully: ${filepath}`);\n                \n                // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\n                trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\n                    source: this.source,\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error(`[HistorySaver] ✗ Failed to save file: ${error}`);\n                throw error;\n            }\n        } else {\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] ⊘ Skipped (unchanged): ${filepath}`);\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

}

{
  "contents": "/**\n * Markdown 生成器\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\n */\n\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from '../../types';\nimport { Translator } from '../../i18n';\n\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\n     */\n    generate(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        messages: Message[]\n    ): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n\n        // 文件头\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n\n        // 标题\n        const title = composer.name || this.t('markdown.untitled');\n        markdown += `# ${title}\\n\\n`;\n\n        // 元信息\n        markdown += this.generateMetadata(composer, messages);\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\n\n        markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n\n        // 消息\n        let messageIndex = 1;\n\n        for (const message of messages) {\n            // 发言者标题（使用二级标题）\n            markdown += this.generateSpeakerTitle(message, messageIndex);\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\n\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\n            if (message.thinking) {\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n\n            // 消息内容\n            if (message.text.trim()) {\n                markdown += message.text.trim();\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n\n            // 工具调用（如果有）\n            if (message.toolUses && message.toolUses.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolUsesSummary(message.toolUses.length);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                for (const toolUse of message.toolUses) {\n                    markdown += toolUse.markdown;\n                    markdown += '\\n\\n';\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\n            }\n\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\n\n            messageIndex++;\n        }\n\n        return markdown.trim() + '\\n';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成文件头\n     */\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        return `<!-- ${this.t('markdown.generatedBy')} -->\n<!-- ${this.t('markdown.cursorSession', {\n    id: composer.composerId,\n    date: this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)\n})} -->`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成元信息\n     */\n    private generateMetadata(composer: ComposerData, messages: Message[]): string {\n        const userMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantMsgCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        const createdDate = this.formatDate(composer.createdAt);\n\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n\n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**创建时间**: ${createdDate}  \n**消息数量**: ${messages.length} 条 (用户: ${userMsgCount}, 助手: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**会话ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        } else {\n            return `**Created**: ${createdDate}  \n**Messages**: ${messages.length} (User: ${userMsgCount}, Assistant: ${assistantMsgCount})  \n**Session ID**: \\`${composer.composerId}\\``;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成发言者标题\n     */\n    private generateSpeakerTitle(message: Message, index: number): string {\n        const time = this.formatDate(message.timestamp);\n\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '💬 用户' : '💬 User';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        } else {\n            const parts = [];\n            if (message.modelName) {\n                parts.push(message.modelName);\n            }\n            if (message.mode) {\n                parts.push(message.mode);\n            }\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\n\n            const locale = this.getLocale();\n            const prefix = locale === 'zh' ? '🤖 助手' : '🤖 Assistant';\n            return `## ${prefix} #${index}${info}\\n\\n_${time}_`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成工具使用摘要\n     */\n    private generateToolUsesSummary(count: number): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        if (locale === 'zh') {\n            return `**🔧 工具调用** (${count} 个)`;\n        } else {\n            return `**🔧 Tool Uses** (${count})`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成思考过程\n     */\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        const title = locale === 'zh' ? '💭 思考过程' : '💭 Thinking Process';\n\n        // 使用 blockquote 使思考过程更易读\n        const lines = thinking.split('\\n');\n        const quotedLines = lines.map(line => line.trim() ? `> ${line}` : '>').join('\\n');\n\n        return `<details>\\n<summary><strong>${title}</strong></summary>\\n\\n${quotedLines}\\n\\n</details>`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成工具调用结果\n     */\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\n        let markdown = '';\n        const locale = this.getLocale();\n        const resultLabel = locale === 'zh' ? '结果' : 'Result';\n\n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\n            markdown += `<details>\\n<summary><strong>📋 ${resultLabel}: ${tool.name}</strong></summary>\\n\\n`;\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\n            markdown += `</details>\\n\\n`;\n        }\n\n        return markdown.trim();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取当前语言环境\n     */\n    private getLocale(): string {\n        const testKey = this.t('mode.chat');\n        return testKey === '对话' ? 'zh' : 'en';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\n     */\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\n    }\n}\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 6096,
  "totalLinesInFile": 204
}

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 类型定义文件\n * 基于 Cursor SQLite 数据库实际结构\n */\n\n/**\n * Composer Data - 对话容器\n */\nexport interface ComposerData {\n    _v: number;\n    composerId: string;\n    name: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    lastUpdatedAt?: string;\n    \n    // 对话引用列表（关键！）\n    fullConversationHeadersOnly: Array<{\n        bubbleId: string;\n        type: number; // 1=用户消息, 2=AI响应\n    }>;\n    \n    // 其他元数据\n    text: string;\n    richText: string;\n    modelConfig: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    unifiedMode: number; // 1=Chat, 2=Agent\n    isAgentic: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * 用户消息 Bubble (Type 1)\n */\nexport interface UserBubble {\n    _v: number;\n    type: 1;\n    bubbleId: string;\n    requestId: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    \n    // 用户输入内容\n    text: string;\n    richText: string;\n    \n    // 上下文信息\n    modelInfo?: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    unifiedMode?: number;\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * AI 响应 Bubble (Type 2)\n */\nexport interface AIResponseBubble {\n    _v: number;\n    type: 2;\n    bubbleId: string;\n    requestId: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    capabilityType?: number;\n    \n    // AI 响应内容\n    text: string;\n    \n    // AI 思考过程（thinking models）\n    thinking?: {\n        text: string;\n        signature: string;\n    };\n    thinkingStyle?: number;\n    \n    // 时间信息\n    timingInfo?: {\n        clientStartTime: number;\n        clientRpcSendTime: number;\n        clientSettleTime: number;\n        clientEndTime: number;\n    };\n    \n    // 模型信息\n    modelInfo?: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    \n    // 工具调用结果\n    toolResults?: Array<{\n        name: string;\n        result: any;\n    }>;\n    \n    // 工具调用（capabilityType === 15）\n    toolFormerData?: ToolFormerData | null;\n    \n    unifiedMode?: number;\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Bubble 联合类型\n */\nexport type Bubble = UserBubble | AIResponseBubble;\n\n/**\n * 消息结构（用于 Markdown 生成）\n */\nexport interface Message {\n    id: string;\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system';\n    text: string;\n    thinking?: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    modelName?: string;\n    mode?: string;\n    context?: any; // 上下文信息，如文件路径、代码选择等\n    toolResults?: Array<{\n        name: string;\n        result: any;\n    }>;\n    toolUses?: ToolUseBlock[];\n    images?: string[]; // 图片附件\n}\n\n/**\n * 数据库行结构\n */\nexport interface DatabaseRow {\n    key: string;\n    value: any; // BLOB or TEXT\n}\n\n/**\n * Cursor 工具调用原始数据\n */\nexport interface ToolFormerData {\n    name: string;\n    tool: string;\n    toolCallId: string;\n    toolIndex: number;\n    modelCallId?: string;\n    status?: string;\n    rawArgs?: string;\n    params?: any;\n    result?: string;\n    additionalData?: any;\n}\n\nexport interface ToolUseBlock {\n    name: string;\n    markdown: string;\n}\n\n\n",

---

# Rules 生成与同步功能 - 实施方案

## 一、功能概述

根据 `.llm-chat-history/history/` 目录下的聊天历史文件，自动生成 Cursor 可识别的 Rules 文件，帮助用户将 AI 对话中的最佳实践、代码规范等沉淀为可复用的 Rules。

### 两个核心命令

| 命令 | 名称 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|
| `chatHistory.generateRules` | LLMChatHistory: Generate Rules from History | 分析历史对话，调用 AI 模型生成 Rules |
| `chatHistory.syncRules` | LLMChatHistory: Sync Rules to Cursor | 将审阅后的 Rules 同步到 `.cursor/rules/` |

---

## 二、技术方案

### 2.1 目录结构

```
workspace/
├── .llm-chat-history/
│   ├── history/           # 现有的聊天历史（Markdown 文件）
│   └── rules/             # 【新增】生成的 Rules 草稿
│       ├── coding-standards.mdc
│       ├── project-conventions.mdc
│       └── ...
├── .cursor/
│   └── rules/             # Cursor 识别的 Rules 目录
│       ├── coding-standards.mdc
│       └── ...
```

### 2.2 Rules 文件格式（MDC）

Cursor Rules 采用 MDC（Markdown with front matter）格式：

```markdown
---
description: 从聊天历史中提取的代码规范
globs: 
  - "**/*.ts"
  - "**/*.tsx"
alwaysApply: false
---

# 代码规范

- 使用函数式组件和 Hooks
- 优先使用 TypeScript 接口而非 type
- 错误处理使用 try-catch 包裹
...
```

### 2.3 核心模块设计

#### 新增文件结构

```
src/
├── rules/
│   ├── rules-generator.ts        # Rules 生成器（调用 LM API）
│   ├── rules-sync.ts             # Rules 同步器
│   ├── history-analyzer.ts       # 历史文件分析器
│   ├── mdc-formatter.ts          # MDC 格式生成器
│   └── rules-types.ts            # 类型定义
```

---

## 三、详细实现流程

### 3.1 生成 Rules 命令 (`chatHistory.generateRules`)

#### 流程图

```
用户触发命令
    ↓
读取 .llm-chat-history/history/ 下的文件
    ↓
用户选择要分析的历史文件（QuickPick 多选）
    ↓
提取文件内容，构建 Prompt
    ↓
调用 VS Code Language Model API (vscode.lm)
    ↓
生成 Rules 内容
    ↓
打开预览窗口供用户审阅/编辑
    ↓
用户确认后保存到 .llm-chat-history/rules/
```

#### 关键代码设计

```typescript
// rules-generator.ts
import * as vscode from 'vscode';

export class RulesGenerator {
    /**
     * 生成 Rules
     */
    async generateRules(): Promise<void> {
        // 1. 让用户选择历史文件
        const historyFiles = await this.getHistoryFiles();
        const selectedFiles = await this.showFileSelector(historyFiles);
        
        if (!selectedFiles || selectedFiles.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        // 2. 读取并分析历史内容
        const historyContent = await this.readHistoryFiles(selectedFiles);
        
        // 3. 构建 Prompt
        const prompt = this.buildPrompt(historyContent);
        
        // 4. 调用 LM API
        const rulesContent = await this.callLanguageModel(prompt);
        
        // 5. 打开编辑器供用户审阅
        await this.openForReview(rulesContent);
    }

    /**
     * 调用 VS Code Language Model API
     */
    private async callLanguageModel(prompt: string): Promise<string> {
        // 获取可用的模型
        const models = await vscode.lm.selectChatModels({
            vendor: 'copilot',  // 或让用户选择
            family: 'gpt-4'
        });

        if (models.length === 0) {
            // 如果没有可用模型，使用 Cursor 内置的对话能力
            throw new Error('No language model available');
        }

        const model = models[0];
        const messages = [
            vscode.LanguageModelChatMessage.User(prompt)
        ];

        const response = await model.sendRequest(messages, {}, new vscode.CancellationTokenSource().token);
        
        let result = '';
        for await (const chunk of response.text) {
            result += chunk;
        }
        
        return result;
    }
}
```

#### Prompt 模板设计

```typescript
private buildPrompt(historyContent: string): string {
    return `You are an expert at extracting coding rules and best practices from AI chat conversations.

Analyze the following chat history and extract useful rules that can help guide future AI coding sessions.

Focus on:
1. Coding conventions and style guidelines
2. Project-specific patterns and practices
3. Error handling approaches
4. Architecture decisions
5. Workflow preferences
6. Tool usage patterns

Format your output as Cursor Rules in MDC format:

---
description: [Brief description of the rules]
globs: 
  - "**/*"
alwaysApply: false
---

# [Category Title]

- Rule 1
- Rule 2
...

---

Chat History to analyze:

${historyContent}

---

Generate comprehensive but concise rules based on the patterns found in this conversation.
Output in the same language as the chat history (Chinese if the conversation is in Chinese).`;
}
```

### 3.2 同步 Rules 命令 (`chatHistory.syncRules`)

#### 流程图

```
用户触发命令
    ↓
扫描 .llm-chat-history/rules/ 下的文件
    ↓
显示文件列表供用户选择
    ↓
检查 .cursor/rules/ 目录是否存在
    ↓
复制选中的文件到 .cursor/rules/
    ↓
处理文件名冲突（提示覆盖/重命名/跳过）
    ↓
显示同步结果
```

#### 关键代码设计

```typescript
// rules-sync.ts
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as fs from 'fs/promises';
import * as path from 'path';

export class RulesSync {
    private workspaceRoot: string;

    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {
        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;
    }

    /**
     * 同步 Rules 到 Cursor
     */
    async syncRules(): Promise<void> {
        const sourceDir = path.join(this.workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history/rules');
        const targetDir = path.join(this.workspaceRoot, '.cursor/rules');

        // 1. 检查源目录
        const files = await this.getRulesFiles(sourceDir);
        if (files.length === 0) {
            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
                'No rules found in .llm-chat-history/rules/. Run "Generate Rules" first.'
            );
            return;
        }

        // 2. 让用户选择要同步的文件
        const selectedFiles = await this.showFileSelector(files);
        if (!selectedFiles || selectedFiles.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        // 3. 确保目标目录存在
        await fs.mkdir(targetDir, { recursive: true });

        // 4. 复制文件
        let synced = 0;
        for (const file of selectedFiles) {
            const sourcePath = path.join(sourceDir, file);
            const targetPath = path.join(targetDir, file);

            // 处理冲突
            if (await this.fileExists(targetPath)) {
                const action = await this.handleConflict(file);
                if (action === 'skip') continue;
                if (action === 'cancel') return;
            }

            await fs.copyFile(sourcePath, targetPath);
            synced++;
        }

        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
            `Successfully synced ${synced} rule(s) to .cursor/rules/`
        );
    }
}
```

Generating rules from 3 history file(s)...

## 六、注意事项

### 6.1 Language Model API 兼容性

由于 Cursor 是基于 VS Code 的 fork，它可能：
1. 完全支持 `vscode.lm` API
2. 有自己的 API 实现
3. 不支持该 API

**备选方案**：
- 如果 `vscode.lm` 不可用，可以让用户手动复制 Prompt 到 Cursor 对话框，然后粘贴生成的结果
- 或者直接使用 Cursor 的对话能力（如果有 API 的话）

### 6.2 大文件处理

- 历史文件可能很大，需要做分块处理
- 可以设置最大 token 限制，超出时提示用户选择更少的文件

### 6.3 多语言支持

- 根据用户的 `chatHistory.locale` 设置，生成对应语言的 Rules
- Prompt 应该指示模型使用与历史记录相同的语言

---

## 资料查询总结

### 查询关键词

| 序号 | 查询关键词 | 目的 |
|------|-----------|------|
| 1 | `Cursor IDE vscode.lm Language Model API support extension` | 查询 Cursor 对 LM API 的支持 |

| 3 | `Cursor editor extension API documentation vscode compatibility` | 查询 Cursor 扩展 API 文档 |

| 5 | `site:forum.cursor.com vscode.lm API extensions` | 直接搜索 Cursor 官方论坛 |

### 关键发现

| 来源 | 内容 |

| **Cursor Forum** ([forum.cursor.com/t/vscode-lm-api-in-vscode-extensions/26563](https://forum.cursor.com/t/vscode-lm-api-in-vscode-extensions/26563)) | Cursor 团队成员 **Dan** 表示：*"我们目前尚未通过该 API 暴露任何模型，但已将此列为团队需要研究的事项。"* (截至 2025 年 1 月) |

### 结论

**Cursor 目前不支持 `vscode.lm` API**。虽然 Cursor 基于 VS Code，但它没有开放 Language Model API 供第三方扩展使用。官方已将此列入待研究事项，但尚未实现。

## 最终方案确认

基于资料查询和你的确认，最终方案如下：

| 项目 | 决策 |
|------|------|
| **Rules 格式** | 使用 `.mdc` 扩展名 |
| **LM API** | 采用 **手动复制 Prompt** 方案（生成 Prompt → 用户复制到 Cursor 对话 → 粘贴生成结果） |
| **文件选择** | 用户选择，显示每个文件的**字符数**和**估算 Token 数**（字符数 ÷ 4） |
| **合并策略** | 多个历史文件合并生成**一个** Rules 文件 |

### 用户交互流程（更新版）

```
1. 用户执行 "Generate Rules" 命令
    ↓
2. 显示历史文件列表（含 Token 估算）
    ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Select chat history files to analyze                        │
    ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
    │ ☑ 2025-12-30_11-51Z-插件mac聊天记录... (~3,200 tokens)      │
    │ ☑ 2025-12-28_03-04Z-客户readme内容... (~1,500 tokens)       │
    │ ☐ 2025-12-27_13-00Z-ubuntu-聊天记录... (~2,800 tokens)      │
    │ ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── │
    │ Total selected: ~4,700 tokens                               │
    └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
    ↓
3. 生成 Prompt，打开新编辑器显示
    ↓
4. 用户复制 Prompt 到 Cursor Chat，获取生成结果
    ↓
5. 用户将结果粘贴回来（或直接在编辑器中编辑）
    ↓
6. 保存到 .llm-chat-history/rules/generated-rules.mdc
    ↓
7. 用户执行 "Sync Rules" 命令同步到 .cursor/rules/
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Rules 模块类型定义\n */\n\n/**\n * 历史文件信息（用于选择器显示）\n */\nexport interface HistoryFileInfo {\n    /** 文件名 */\n    filename: string;\n    /** 完整路径 */\n    filepath: string;\n    /** 文件大小（字节） */\n    size: number;\n    /** 字符数 */\n    charCount: number;\n    /** 估算 Token 数（字符数 / 4） */\n    estimatedTokens: number;\n    /** 创建时间 */\n    createdAt: Date;\n    /** 文件标题（从文件名提取） */\n    title: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * MDC 文件元数据（front matter）\n */\nexport interface MdcMetadata {\n    /** 规则描述 */\n    description: string;\n    /** 适用的文件模式（glob patterns） */\n    globs?: string[];\n    /** 是否始终应用 */\n    alwaysApply: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * Rules 生成结果\n */\nexport interface GeneratedRules {\n    /** MDC 元数据 */\n    metadata: MdcMetadata;\n    /** 规则内容（Markdown 格式） */\n    content: string;\n    /** 完整的 MDC 文件内容 */\n    fullContent: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * 同步操作结果\n */\nexport interface SyncResult {\n    /** 是否成功 */\n    success: boolean;\n    /** 同步的文件数 */\n    syncedCount: number;\n    /** 跳过的文件数 */\n    skippedCount: number;\n    /** 错误信息（如果有） */\n    error?: string;\n    /** 同步的文件列表 */\n    syncedFiles: string[];\n}\n\n/**\n * 冲突处理动作\n */\nexport type ConflictAction = 'overwrite' | 'skip' | 'cancel';\n\n/**\n * Prompt 生成配置\n */\nexport interface PromptConfig {\n    /** 历史内容 */\n    historyContent: string;\n    /** 语言（zh/en） */\n    locale: string;\n    /** 总 Token 数估算 */\n    totalTokens: number;\n}\n\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/clark/Project/llm-chat-history/llm-chat-history-plugin/src/rules/history-analyzer.ts",
  "contents": "/**\n * 历史文件分析器\n * 负责读取和分析 .llm-chat-history/history/ 目录下的文件\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { HistoryFileInfo } from './rules-types';\n\nexport class HistoryAnalyzer {\n    private historyDir: string;\n\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history/history');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取所有历史文件信息\n     */\n    async getHistoryFiles(): Promise<HistoryFileInfo[]> {\n        try {\n            // 检查目录是否存在\n            await fs.access(this.historyDir);\n        } catch {\n            return [];\n        }\n\n        const files = await fs.readdir(this.historyDir);\n        const mdFiles = files.filter(f => f.endsWith('.md'));\n\n        const fileInfos: HistoryFileInfo[] = [];\n\n        for (const filename of mdFiles) {\n            const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n            try {\n                const stats = await fs.stat(filepath);\n                const content = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n                const charCount = content.length;\n                const estimatedTokens = Math.ceil(charCount / 4);\n                const title = this.extractTitle(filename, content);\n\n                fileInfos.push({\n                    filename,\n                    filepath,\n                    size: stats.size,\n                    charCount,\n                    estimatedTokens,\n                    createdAt: stats.birthtime,\n                    title,\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error(`[HistoryAnalyzer] Failed to read file: ${filename}`, error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 按创建时间倒序排列（最新的在前）\n        fileInfos.sort((a, b) => b.createdAt.getTime() - a.createdAt.getTime());\n\n        return fileInfos;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 读取选中文件的内容\n     */\n    async readFiles(filepaths: string[]): Promise<string> {\n        const contents: string[] = [];\n\n        for (const filepath of filepaths) {\n            try {\n                const content = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n                const filename = path.basename(filepath);\n                contents.push(`\\n\\n========== ${filename} ==========\\n\\n${content}`);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error(`[HistoryAnalyzer] Failed to read file: ${filepath}`, error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        return contents.join('\\n');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 从文件名或内容中提取标题\n     */\n    private extractTitle(filename: string, content: string): string {\n        // 尝试从 Markdown 内容中提取 H1 标题\n        const h1Match = content.match(/^#\\s+(.+)$/m);\n        if (h1Match) {\n            return h1Match[1].trim();\n        }\n\n        // 从文件名提取（去掉时间戳和扩展名）\n        // 格式: 2025-12-30_11-51Z-插件mac聊天记录保存问题.md\n        const nameMatch = filename.match(/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}_\\d{2}-\\d{2}Z-(.+)\\.md$/);\n        if (nameMatch) {\n            return nameMatch[1].replace(/-/g, ' ');\n        }\n\n        return filename.replace('.md', '');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 计算总 Token 数\n     */\n    calculateTotalTokens(files: HistoryFileInfo[]): number {\n        return files.reduce((sum, f) => sum + f.estimatedTokens, 0);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 格式化 Token 数显示\n     */\n    formatTokenCount(tokens: number): string {\n        if (tokens >= 1000) {\n            return `~${(tokens / 1000).toFixed(1)}k tokens`;\n        }\n        return `~${tokens} tokens`;\n    }\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/clark/Project/llm-chat-history/llm-chat-history-plugin/src/rules/mdc-formatter.ts",
  "contents": "/**\n * MDC 格式生成器\n * 负责生成 Cursor Rules 的 MDC 文件格式\n */\n\nimport { MdcMetadata, GeneratedRules } from './rules-types';\n\nexport class MdcFormatter {\n    /**\n     * 生成完整的 MDC 文件内容\n     */\n    formatMdc(metadata: MdcMetadata, content: string): string {\n        const frontMatter = this.formatFrontMatter(metadata);\n        return `${frontMatter}\\n\\n${content.trim()}\\n`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 front matter 部分\n     */\n    private formatFrontMatter(metadata: MdcMetadata): string {\n        const lines: string[] = ['---'];\n\n        lines.push(`description: ${metadata.description}`);\n\n        if (metadata.globs && metadata.globs.length > 0) {\n            lines.push('globs:');\n            for (const glob of metadata.globs) {\n                lines.push(`  - \"${glob}\"`);\n            }\n        } else {\n            lines.push('globs:');\n        }\n\n        lines.push(`alwaysApply: ${metadata.alwaysApply}`);\n\n        lines.push('---');\n\n        return lines.join('\\n');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 解析 MDC 文件内容\n     */\n    parseMdc(content: string): GeneratedRules | null {\n        const frontMatterMatch = content.match(/^---\\n([\\s\\S]*?)\\n---\\n?([\\s\\S]*)$/);\n        if (!frontMatterMatch) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        const frontMatter = frontMatterMatch[1];\n        const body = frontMatterMatch[2].trim();\n\n        const metadata = this.parseFrontMatter(frontMatter);\n\n        return {\n            metadata,\n            content: body,\n            fullContent: content,\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 解析 front matter\n     */\n    private parseFrontMatter(frontMatter: string): MdcMetadata {\n        const metadata: MdcMetadata = {\n            description: '',\n            globs: [],\n            alwaysApply: false,\n        };\n\n        const lines = frontMatter.split('\\n');\n        let currentKey = '';\n\n        for (const line of lines) {\n            const keyMatch = line.match(/^(\\w+):\\s*(.*)$/);\n            if (keyMatch) {\n                currentKey = keyMatch[1];\n                const value = keyMatch[2].trim();\n\n                if (currentKey === 'description') {\n                    metadata.description = value;\n                } else if (currentKey === 'alwaysApply') {\n                    metadata.alwaysApply = value === 'true';\n                } else if (currentKey === 'globs' && value) {\n                    // 单行 globs\n                    metadata.globs = [value.replace(/^[\"']|[\"']$/g, '')];\n                }\n            } else if (currentKey === 'globs') {\n                // 多行 globs\n                const globMatch = line.match(/^\\s+-\\s*[\"']?([^\"']+)[\"']?$/);\n                if (globMatch) {\n                    metadata.globs!.push(globMatch[1]);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return metadata;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成默认的规则元数据\n     */\n    getDefaultMetadata(locale: string): MdcMetadata {\n        return {\n            description: locale === 'zh'\n                ? '从聊天历史中提取的编码规范和最佳实践'\n                : 'Coding standards and best practices extracted from chat history',\n            globs: ['**/*'],\n            alwaysApply: false,\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成默认文件名\n     */\n    generateFilename(): string {\n        const now = new Date();\n        const timestamp = now.toISOString().slice(0, 10); // YYYY-MM-DD\n        return `generated-rules-${timestamp}.mdc`;\n    }\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/clark/Project/llm-chat-history/llm-chat-history-plugin/src/rules/rules-generator.ts",
  "contents": "/**\n * Rules 生成器\n * 负责从聊天历史生成 Cursor Rules\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { HistoryAnalyzer } from './history-analyzer';\nimport { MdcFormatter } from './mdc-formatter';\nimport { HistoryFileInfo } from './rules-types';\nimport { Translator } from '../i18n';\n\nexport class RulesGenerator {\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private analyzer: HistoryAnalyzer;\n    private formatter: MdcFormatter;\n    private rulesDir: string;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private locale: string;\n\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, t: Translator, locale: string = 'en') {\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.analyzer = new HistoryAnalyzer(workspaceRoot);\n        this.formatter = new MdcFormatter();\n        this.rulesDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history/rules');\n        this.t = t;\n        this.locale = locale;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Rules 主流程\n     */\n    async generateRules(): Promise<void> {\n        // 1. 获取历史文件列表\n        const historyFiles = await this.analyzer.getHistoryFiles();\n\n        if (historyFiles.length === 0) {\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? '未找到聊天历史文件。请先使用 \"Save Chat History Now\" 保存一些对话。'\n                    : 'No chat history files found. Please save some conversations first using \"Save Chat History Now\".'\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 2. 显示文件选择器\n        const selectedFiles = await this.showFileSelector(historyFiles);\n        if (!selectedFiles || selectedFiles.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 3. 计算总 Token 数\n        const totalTokens = this.analyzer.calculateTotalTokens(selectedFiles);\n\n        // 4. 读取文件内容\n        const filepaths = selectedFiles.map(f => f.filepath);\n        const historyContent = await this.analyzer.readFiles(filepaths);\n\n        // 5. 生成 Prompt\n        const prompt = this.buildPrompt(historyContent, totalTokens);\n\n        // 6. 显示 Prompt 供用户复制\n        await this.showPromptForCopy(prompt, totalTokens);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 显示文件选择器（带 Token 估算）\n     */\n    private async showFileSelector(files: HistoryFileInfo[]): Promise<HistoryFileInfo[] | undefined> {\n        const items = files.map(file => ({\n            label: file.title,\n            description: this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(file.estimatedTokens),\n            detail: file.filename,\n            picked: false,\n            file,\n        }));\n\n        const selected = await vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {\n            canPickMany: true,\n            placeHolder: this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? '选择要分析的聊天历史文件（显示估算的 Token 数）'\n                : 'Select chat history files to analyze (showing estimated tokens)',\n            title: this.locale === 'zh' ? '生成 Rules' : 'Generate Rules',\n        });\n\n        if (!selected || selected.length === 0) {\n            return undefined;\n        }\n\n        // 显示总 Token 数确认\n        const totalTokens = selected.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.file.estimatedTokens, 0);\n        const tokenInfo = this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(totalTokens);\n\n        const confirm = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? `已选择 ${selected.length} 个文件，总计 ${tokenInfo}。继续？`\n                : `Selected ${selected.length} file(s), total ${tokenInfo}. Continue?`,\n            { modal: true },\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '继续' : 'Continue'\n        );\n\n        if (!confirm) {\n            return undefined;\n        }\n\n        return selected.map(item => item.file);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 构建 Prompt\n     */\n    private buildPrompt(historyContent: string, totalTokens: number): string {\n        if (this.locale === 'zh') {\n            return `你是一位专业的代码规范专家。请分析以下 AI 聊天记录，从中提取有价值的编码规则和最佳实践。\n\n请关注以下方面：\n1. 编码规范和代码风格\n2. 项目特定的模式和实践\n3. 错误处理方式\n4. 架构决策\n5. 工作流程偏好\n6. 工具使用模式\n\n请以 Cursor Rules 的 MDC 格式输出规则：\n\n\\`\\`\\`\n---\ndescription: [规则的简要描述]\nglobs: \n  - \"**/*\"\nalwaysApply: false\n---\n\n# [分类标题]\n\n- 规则 1\n- 规则 2\n...\n\\`\\`\\`\n\n---\n\n待分析的聊天记录（约 ${this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(totalTokens)}）：\n\n${historyContent}\n\n---\n\n请根据以上对话内容，生成全面但简洁的编码规则。使用中文输出。`;\n        } else {\n            return `You are an expert at extracting coding rules and best practices from AI chat conversations.\n\nAnalyze the following chat history and extract useful rules that can help guide future AI coding sessions.\n\nFocus on:\n1. Coding conventions and style guidelines\n2. Project-specific patterns and practices\n3. Error handling approaches\n4. Architecture decisions\n5. Workflow preferences\n6. Tool usage patterns\n\nFormat your output as Cursor Rules in MDC format:\n\n\\`\\`\\`\n---\ndescription: [Brief description of the rules]\nglobs: \n  - \"**/*\"\nalwaysApply: false\n---\n\n# [Category Title]\n\n- Rule 1\n- Rule 2\n...\n\\`\\`\\`\n\n---\n\nChat History to analyze (approximately ${this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(totalTokens)}):\n\n${historyContent}\n\n---\n\nGenerate comprehensive but concise rules based on the patterns found in this conversation.`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 显示 Prompt 供用户复制，并提供粘贴结果的入口\n     */\n    private async showPromptForCopy(prompt: string, totalTokens: number): Promise<void> {\n        // 创建一个新的未保存文档显示 Prompt\n        const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({\n            content: this.getPromptDocument(prompt, totalTokens),\n            language: 'markdown',\n        });\n\n        await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });\n\n        // 显示操作指引\n        const action = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? '已生成 Prompt。请复制上方的 Prompt 内容，粘贴到 Cursor Chat 中获取生成的 Rules，然后点击 \"粘贴结果\" 按钮。'\n                : 'Prompt generated. Copy the prompt above, paste it into Cursor Chat to generate Rules, then click \"Paste Result\".',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '粘贴结果' : 'Paste Result',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '取消' : 'Cancel'\n        );\n\n        if (action === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '粘贴结果' : 'Paste Result')) {\n            await this.handlePasteResult();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 生成 Prompt 文档内容\n     */\n    private getPromptDocument(prompt: string, totalTokens: number): string {\n        const header = this.locale === 'zh'\n            ? `# 生成 Rules 的 Prompt\n\n> **使用说明**：\n> 1. 复制下方 \"PROMPT START\" 和 \"PROMPT END\" 之间的内容\n> 2. 粘贴到 Cursor Chat 中\n> 3. 等待 AI 生成 Rules\n> 4. 复制生成的 Rules 内容\n> 5. 点击 VS Code 弹出的 \"粘贴结果\" 按钮\n\n**预估 Token 消耗**: ${this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(totalTokens)}\n\n---\n\n<!-- ========== PROMPT START ========== -->\n\n`\n            : `# Prompt for Generating Rules\n\n> **Instructions**:\n> 1. Copy the content between \"PROMPT START\" and \"PROMPT END\" below\n> 2. Paste it into Cursor Chat\n> 3. Wait for AI to generate Rules\n> 4. Copy the generated Rules content\n> 5. Click the \"Paste Result\" button in VS Code popup\n\n**Estimated Token Usage**: ${this.analyzer.formatTokenCount(totalTokens)}\n\n---\n\n<!-- ========== PROMPT START ========== -->\n\n`;\n\n        const footer = this.locale === 'zh'\n            ? `\n\n<!-- ========== PROMPT END ========== -->\n`\n            : `\n\n<!-- ========== PROMPT END ========== -->\n`;\n\n        return header + prompt + footer;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 处理用户粘贴的结果\n     */\n    private async handlePasteResult(): Promise<void> {\n        // 从剪贴板读取内容\n        const clipboardContent = await vscode.env.clipboard.readText();\n\n        if (!clipboardContent.trim()) {\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? '剪贴板为空。请先从 Cursor Chat 复制生成的 Rules。'\n                    : 'Clipboard is empty. Please copy the generated Rules from Cursor Chat first.'\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 尝试提取 MDC 格式内容\n        const mdcContent = this.extractMdcContent(clipboardContent);\n\n        // 打开编辑器让用户审阅\n        const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({\n            content: mdcContent,\n            language: 'markdown',\n        });\n\n        const editor = await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc, { preview: false });\n\n        // 提示用户保存\n        const saveAction = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? '请审阅生成的 Rules，编辑完成后点击 \"保存 Rules\"。'\n                : 'Please review the generated Rules, then click \"Save Rules\" when done editing.',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '保存 Rules' : 'Save Rules',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '取消' : 'Cancel'\n        );\n\n        if (saveAction === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '保存 Rules' : 'Save Rules')) {\n            // 获取编辑器中的最终内容\n            const finalContent = editor.document.getText();\n            await this.saveRules(finalContent);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 从剪贴板内容中提取 MDC 格式\n     */\n    private extractMdcContent(content: string): string {\n        // 如果已经是 MDC 格式，直接返回\n        if (content.trim().startsWith('---')) {\n            return content.trim();\n        }\n\n        // 尝试从代码块中提取\n        const codeBlockMatch = content.match(/```(?:mdc|markdown|md)?\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```/);\n        if (codeBlockMatch && codeBlockMatch[1].trim().startsWith('---')) {\n            return codeBlockMatch[1].trim();\n        }\n\n        // 如果不是 MDC 格式，包装成 MDC 格式\n        const defaultMetadata = this.formatter.getDefaultMetadata(this.locale);\n        return this.formatter.formatMdc(defaultMetadata, content);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 保存 Rules 到文件\n     */\n    private async saveRules(content: string): Promise<void> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.rulesDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.formatter.generateFilename();\n        const filepath = path.join(this.rulesDir, filename);\n\n        // 保存文件\n        await fs.writeFile(filepath, content, 'utf-8');\n\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? `Rules 已保存到 ${filename}。使用 \"Sync Rules to Cursor\" 命令同步到 Cursor。`\n                : `Rules saved to ${filename}. Use \"Sync Rules to Cursor\" command to sync to Cursor.`\n        );\n\n        // 打开保存的文件\n        const savedDoc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(filepath);\n        await vscode.window.showTextDocument(savedDoc);\n    }\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/clark/Project/llm-chat-history/llm-chat-history-plugin/src/rules/rules-sync.ts",
  "contents": "/**\n * Rules 同步器\n * 负责将 .llm-chat-history/rules/ 下的规则同步到 .cursor/rules/\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { SyncResult, ConflictAction } from './rules-types';\nimport { Translator } from '../i18n';\n\nexport class RulesSync {\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private sourceDir: string;\n    private targetDir: string;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private locale: string;\n\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, t: Translator, locale: string = 'en') {\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.sourceDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history/rules');\n        this.targetDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.cursor/rules');\n        this.t = t;\n        this.locale = locale;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 同步 Rules 到 Cursor\n     */\n    async syncRules(): Promise<void> {\n        // 1. 检查源目录是否存在\n        try {\n            await fs.access(this.sourceDir);\n        } catch {\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? '未找到 Rules 文件。请先使用 \"Generate Rules from History\" 命令生成规则。'\n                    : 'No Rules found. Please use \"Generate Rules from History\" command first.'\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 2. 获取规则文件列表\n        const files = await this.getRulesFiles();\n        if (files.length === 0) {\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? '未找到 .mdc 规则文件。请先生成规则。'\n                    : 'No .mdc rule files found. Please generate rules first.'\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 3. 显示文件选择器\n        const selectedFiles = await this.showFileSelector(files);\n        if (!selectedFiles || selectedFiles.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 4. 执行同步\n        const result = await this.performSync(selectedFiles);\n\n        // 5. 显示结果\n        this.showSyncResult(result);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取 Rules 文件列表\n     */\n    private async getRulesFiles(): Promise<string[]> {\n        const files = await fs.readdir(this.sourceDir);\n        return files.filter(f => f.endsWith('.mdc'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 显示文件选择器\n     */\n    private async showFileSelector(files: string[]): Promise<string[] | undefined> {\n        const items = await Promise.all(files.map(async filename => {\n            const filepath = path.join(this.sourceDir, filename);\n            const stats = await fs.stat(filepath);\n            const modifiedDate = stats.mtime.toLocaleDateString();\n\n            return {\n                label: filename,\n                description: this.locale === 'zh' ? `修改于 ${modifiedDate}` : `Modified ${modifiedDate}`,\n                picked: true, // 默认选中\n            };\n        }));\n\n        const selected = await vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {\n            canPickMany: true,\n            placeHolder: this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? '选择要同步到 Cursor 的规则文件'\n                : 'Select rule files to sync to Cursor',\n            title: this.locale === 'zh' ? '同步 Rules' : 'Sync Rules',\n        });\n\n        if (!selected || selected.length === 0) {\n            return undefined;\n        }\n\n        return selected.map(item => item.label);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行同步操作\n     */\n    private async performSync(files: string[]): Promise<SyncResult> {\n        const result: SyncResult = {\n            success: true,\n            syncedCount: 0,\n            skippedCount: 0,\n            syncedFiles: [],\n        };\n\n        // 确保目标目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.targetDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        for (const filename of files) {\n            const sourcePath = path.join(this.sourceDir, filename);\n            const targetPath = path.join(this.targetDir, filename);\n\n            try {\n                // 检查目标文件是否存在\n                let shouldSync = true;\n                try {\n                    await fs.access(targetPath);\n                    // 文件存在，处理冲突\n                    const action = await this.handleConflict(filename);\n                    if (action === 'skip') {\n                        result.skippedCount++;\n                        shouldSync = false;\n                    } else if (action === 'cancel') {\n                        result.success = false;\n                        result.error = this.locale === 'zh' ? '用户取消操作' : 'Cancelled by user';\n                        return result;\n                    }\n                } catch {\n                    // 文件不存在，可以直接复制\n                }\n\n                if (shouldSync) {\n                    await fs.copyFile(sourcePath, targetPath);\n                    result.syncedCount++;\n                    result.syncedFiles.push(filename);\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error(`[RulesSync] Failed to sync file: ${filename}`, error);\n                result.success = false;\n                result.error = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 处理文件冲突\n     */\n    private async handleConflict(filename: string): Promise<ConflictAction> {\n        const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? `文件 \"${filename}\" 已存在于 .cursor/rules/ 中。如何处理？`\n                : `File \"${filename}\" already exists in .cursor/rules/. What do you want to do?`,\n            { modal: true },\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '覆盖' : 'Overwrite',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '跳过' : 'Skip',\n            this.locale === 'zh' ? '取消' : 'Cancel'\n        );\n\n        if (choice === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '覆盖' : 'Overwrite')) {\n            return 'overwrite';\n        } else if (choice === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '跳过' : 'Skip')) {\n            return 'skip';\n        }\n        return 'cancel';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 显示同步结果\n     */\n    private showSyncResult(result: SyncResult): void {\n        if (result.success && result.syncedCount > 0) {\n            const message = this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? `成功同步 ${result.syncedCount} 个规则到 .cursor/rules/`\n                : `Successfully synced ${result.syncedCount} rule(s) to .cursor/rules/`;\n\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(message, this.locale === 'zh' ? '打开目录' : 'Open Folder')\n                .then(async action => {\n                    if (action) {\n                        const uri = vscode.Uri.file(this.targetDir);\n                        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('revealFileInOS', uri);\n                    }\n                });\n        } else if (result.error) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? `同步失败: ${result.error}`\n                    : `Sync failed: ${result.error}`\n            );\n        } else if (result.skippedCount > 0 && result.syncedCount === 0) {\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? `跳过了 ${result.skippedCount} 个文件（已存在）`\n                    : `Skipped ${result.skippedCount} file(s) (already exist)`\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 检查是否有可同步的规则\n     */\n    async hasRulesToSync(): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            await fs.access(this.sourceDir);\n            const files = await this.getRulesFiles();\n            return files.length > 0;\n        } catch {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取规则文件数量\n     */\n    async getRulesCount(): Promise<number> {\n        try {\n            const files = await this.getRulesFiles();\n            return files.length;\n        } catch {\n            return 0;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

'取消' : 'Cancel'\n        );\n\n        if (choice === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '覆盖' : 'Overwrite')) {\n            return 'overwrite';\n        } else if (choice === (this.locale === 'zh' ? '跳过' : 'Skip')) {\n            return 'skip';\n        }\n        return 'cancel';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 显示同步结果\n     */\n    private showSyncResult(result: SyncResult): void {\n        if (result.success && result.syncedCount > 0) {\n            const message = this.locale === 'zh'\n                ? `成功同步 ${result.syncedCount} 个规则到 .cursor/rules/`\n                : `Successfully synced ${result.syncedCount} rule(s) to .cursor/rules/`;\n\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(message, this.locale === 'zh' ? '打开目录' : 'Open Folder')\n                .then(async action => {\n                    if (action) {\n                        const uri = vscode.Uri.file(this.targetDir);\n                        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('revealFileInOS', uri);\n                    }\n                });\n        } else if (result.error) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? `同步失败: ${result.error}`\n                    : `Sync failed: ${result.error}`\n            );\n        } else if (result.skippedCount > 0 && result.syncedCount === 0) {\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                this.locale === 'zh'\n                    ? `跳过了 ${result.skippedCount} 个文件（已存在）`\n                    : `Skipped ${result.skippedCount} file(s) (already exist)`\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 检查是否有可同步的规则\n     */\n    async hasRulesToSync(): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            await fs.access(this.sourceDir);\n            const files = await this.getRulesFiles();\n            return files.length > 0;\n        } catch {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取规则文件数量\n     */\n    async getRulesCount(): Promise<number> {\n        try {\n            const files = await this.getRulesFiles();\n            return files.length;\n        } catch {\n            return 0;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. 'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            showSearchInterface(context);\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 初始化云端同步管理器\n    const cloudSync = new CloudSyncManager(context, localeSetting);\n\n    // 已登录，显示选项\n                vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: t('cloud.logout'), action: 'logout' },\n                    { label: 'Sync Now', action: 'sync' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = await cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled.          }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

## 🤖 Assistant #83 (Agent)

_2025-12-30 12:43Z_

所有代码都已成功编译。让我给你总结一下完成的功能：

---

## ✅ 功能已完成

### 新增文件

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `src/rules/rules-types.ts` | 类型定义（HistoryFileInfo, MdcMetadata, SyncResult 等） |
| `src/rules/history-analyzer.ts` | 历史文件分析器（读取文件、计算 Token 等） |
| `src/rules/mdc-formatter.ts` | MDC 格式生成器（生成/解析 Cursor Rules 格式） |
| `src/rules/rules-generator.ts` | Rules 生成器（主流程，Prompt 生成，用户交互） |
| `src/rules/rules-sync.ts` | Rules 同步器（同步到 `.cursor/rules/`） |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 修改内容 |
|------|----------|
| `src/extension.ts` | 导入 Rules 模块，注册两个新命令 |
| `package.json` | 添加两个新命令和两个新配置项 |

### 新增命令

| 命令 | 标题 |
|------|------|
| `chatHistory.generateRules` | LLMChatHistory: Generate Rules from History |
| `chatHistory.syncRules` | LLMChatHistory: Sync Rules to Cursor |

### 新增配置

| 配置项 | 默认值 | 说明 |
|--------|--------|------|
| `chatHistory.rules.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/rules` | 生成的 Rules 保存目录 |
| `chatHistory.rules.cursorRulesPath` | `.cursor/rules` | Cursor Rules 目录路径 |

---

## 使用流程

### 1. 生成 Rules

1. 按 `Cmd+Shift+P`（Mac）或 `Ctrl+Shift+P`（Windows/Linux）
2. 输入 `Generate Rules from History`
3. 选择要分析的历史文件（显示每个文件的估算 Token 数）
4. 确认选择后，插件会生成 Prompt
5. 复制 Prompt 到 Cursor Chat
6. 等待 AI 生成 Rules
7. 复制生成的结果，点击 "粘贴结果" 按钮
8. 审阅/编辑后保存到 `.llm-chat-history/rules/`

### 2. 同步 Rules

1. 按 `Cmd+Shift+P` 输入 `Sync Rules to Cursor`
2. 选择要同步的 `.mdc` 规则文件
3. 插件会将选中的文件复制到 `.cursor/rules/`
4. 如果文件已存在，会提示覆盖/跳过/取消

---

代码已完成并通过编译！你可以重新加载 VS Code 窗口或运行扩展来测试这两个新命令。
